{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query asks about bone sounding in modern times. Bone sounding typically refers to the process of determining the condition of a bone, often through imaging techniques. The options provided include RVG, probing, CBCT, and radiovisiography. Given the context of modern times and the use of advanced imaging techniques, CBCT (Cone Beam Computed Tomography) is the most relevant and advanced method among the options. RVG and radiovisiography are related to dental radiography, and probing is a manual technique, neither of which are as advanced as CBCT for modern bone sounding.", "answer_choice": "C"}
